_comment: Syntax Corporation © 2026 — EBS PAF Agent skill v2.1.0 (2026.06.13). CANONICAL Claude Code hook wiring (SKILL.md frontmatter no longer carries hooks, so the skill validates for claude.ai / Cowork / Skills API upload). To enable enforcement in Claude Code: run scaffold_enforcement.py to install .claude/paf-hooks/, then merge this 'hooks' object into <project>/.claude/settings.json. On claude.ai / Cowork no hooks fire — the gates are binding procedurally.
